block.title: LookingGlass Cyber ScoutVision Configuration
block.text: In order for this application to utilize LG services, you must enter valid credentials. If you are not currently a customer of LookingGlass, please contact our Sales team via phone at (888) 726-8893 or via email at support@lookingglasscyber.com to obtain demo credentials.

input.label: Scoutvision Project(s) - Comma Separate Multiple Projects
Scoutvision Domain: Enter the domain name of your ScoutVision server instance (e.g. company.lgscout.com)
SV API Username (This must be set to sv_api for the app to function correctly)
Enter the proxy server address (e.g. mycompany.proxy.com:8080, not http://mycompany.proxy.com:8080)
